name: Viserion
description:
Viserion was one of the three male dragons born in the wastelands beyond Lhazar, along with Drogon and Rhaegal. He was named after Daenerys Targaryen's elder brother, Viserys just like his brother Drogon was named after Daenerys's former husband Khal Drogo and his brother Rhaegal was named after Daenerys's older brother Rhaegar. Viserion could be distinguished by his cream and gold colored scales, and red-orange wings and breathed normal dragon fire as well as having green eyes.

Eventually, Viserion became an ice dragon (although different from the ones of legend), and was enslaved by the Night King. Viserion was also able to breathe fire that was capable of melting the Wall, though it was blue in color. He is not as aggressive as his older dragon brother Drogon, He is a more calm dragon much like Rhaegal.

However, Viserion can show ferocity if needed and will undoubtedly defend his mother from any enemy menacing her. Daenerys has trained him to respond to vocal commands in her mother tongue of High Valyrian, especially "Dracarys" (High Valyrian for dragonfire), to which he responds by instantly breathing fire and burning anything in his path.

Being a dragon, Viserion, has an immense physical strength and can spit destructive streams of fire. He can also fly extremely high and at great speeds, more than any other animal. After becoming an ice dragon, his eyes turned blue, characteristic of White Walkers and their wights.

As an undead ice dragon under the control of the Night King, Viserion's scales have seemingly lost their golden color, now appearing more deathly blue, His wings are torn and tattered in several places, and his horns have lost their bony color and resemble the white icicles crowning his master.

Given the supernatural nature of dragons, this may be Viserion's body reacting to the Night King's magic. Unlike his living version, Viserion can spit blue fire, powerful enough to demolish a part of the Wall with a single breath. Undead Viserion has also demonstrated strength enough to maintain a battle against his living dragon brothers Drogon and Rhaegal mounted by Daenerys and Jon respectively, heavily wounding Rhaegal in the process.

In addition, the undead version of Viserion, during the fight with Rhaegal and Drogon, is disfigured on the left side of the face and gets deep wounds around the neck, from which uncontrolled flames come out, as well as from the mouth. As a wight dragon, he no longer possessed free will.

Viserion, now undead and brought back to life under the Night King's control and losing free will, only followed the Night King's commands like any other wight in the Army of the Dead. He, like his brother Rhaegal, are huge dragons that are also fast but they are considerably less so than their elder dragon brother Drogon because both Rhaegal and Viserion spent time locked up for safety reasons after Drogon burned a child alive by accident when Drogon was hunting for food.

Despite having that stunted growth and lack of freedom, Viserion continues to grow stronger, bigger, and faster as time passes once he does have his freedom. Just like his dragon brothers, Viserion is also extremely smart, dangerous, calculating, fiercely loyal and protective, and many more things, definitely not to be underestimated.

Viserion is a male dragon, one of Daenerys Targaryen's three dragons with his dragon brothers Drogon and Rhaegal. Like his dragon brothers Drogon and Rhaegal, Viserion's real mother is believed to be the dragon Dreamfyre, a dragon that once belonged to Helaena Targaryen before as well as during the Dance of the Dragons.

Viserion, like his brothers Drogon and Rhaegal, is a huge dragon that are also fast but he and Rhaegal are considerably less so than their elder dragon brother Drogon because both Rhaegal and he spent time locked up for safety reasons after Drogon took a life.
